# plugin_payload — generated, do not edit

This directory is a byte-exact mirror of the repository's `klink_plugin/`
KLayout salt package, embedded here so the plugin ships inside the
`klayout-klink` wheel (`klink plugin install` copies it into KLayout's
`salt/` directory).

Source of truth: `klink_plugin/` at the repository root.
Regenerate with: `python tools/sync_plugin_payload.py`
A unit test guards against drift between the two trees.
